final_answer: Individuals should consider getting tested for COVID-19 if they exhibit symptoms of the illness, such as fever, cough, or shortness of breath, to confirm infection [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00079]. Testing is also essential for those who believe they may be infected [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00194]. Additionally, it is advised to test five days after coming into contact with someone who has COVID-19 [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00023]. Children with symptoms should seek medical care and consider getting tested [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00021]. Fully vaccinated individuals showing symptoms should contact their doctor about testing [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00013].
